title: juncus × sallandiae
intro: Juncus × sallandiae, also known as Sallander's rush or Dutch rush, is a hybrid plant species belonging to the Juncaceae family, derived from the cross between Juncus conglomeratus and Juncus subcaespitositus. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Juncus × sallandiae include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Juncus × sallandiae include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
